decisions_this_milestone.decision: Retry + Redis-keyed dedup landed together on onWaveCreated
decisions_this_milestone.rationale: Retry alone would cause duplicate iOS pushes on transient APNs errors; dedup alone would drop permanently on the first failure

decisions_this_milestone.decision: Notification receipt is never intent — reciprocal Wave requires OS actionIdentifier through native MethodChannel bridge
decisions_this_milestone.rationale: Background handler previously wrote reciprocal wave on any INCOMING_WAVE receipt; auditor flagged as consent-adjacent abuse vector before public launch

decisions_this_milestone.decision: Local DEBUG-env transcript exposure classified as security hygiene, not App Store submission blocker
decisions_this_milestone.rationale: No value entered source control or a public channel; scan of committed diffs was clean; still rotate genuine server credentials as prudent hygiene

next_action: Open Firebase Console → am---dating-app → Cloud Messaging → Apple app 1:343655004163:ios:5eea92b9656fc3b8fc3636; inspect stored APNs Key ID / Team ID / expiry against Apple Developer team LB6LS532CV; upload valid retained .p8 if missing/revoked; install build 22 on physical iPhone and run approved foreground/background/killed + explicit Wave Back procedure with dedicated production test accounts before App Store Connect upload.
